    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "#!/usr/bin/env python3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "UI/UX Pro Max Core - BM25 search engine for UI/UX style guides"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import csv"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "import re"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "from pathlib import Path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "from math import log"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "from collections import defaultdict"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "# ============ CONFIGURATION ============"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "DATA_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.parent / \"data\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "MAX_RESULTS = 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "CSV_CONFIG = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    \"style\": {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        \"file\": \"styles.csv\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        \"search_cols\": [\"Style Category\", \"Keywords\", \"Best For\", \"Type\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        \"output_cols\": [\"Style Category\", \"Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary Colors\", \"Effects \u0026 Animation\", \"Best For\", \"Performance\", \"Accessibility\", \"Framework Compatibility\", \"Complexity\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    \"prompt\": {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        \"file\": \"prompts.csv\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        \"search_cols\": [\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        \"output_cols\": [\"Style Category\", \"AI Prompt Keywords (Copy-Paste Ready)\", \"CSS/Technical Keywords\", \"Implementation Checklist\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    \"color\": {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        \"file\": \"colors.csv\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        \"search_cols\": [\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Notes\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        \"output_cols\": [\"Product Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Primary (Hex)\", \"Secondary (Hex)\", \"CTA (Hex)\", \"Background (Hex)\", \"Text (Hex)\", \"Border (Hex)\", \"Notes\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    \"chart\": {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        \"file\": \"charts.csv\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        \"search_cols\": [\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Accessibility Notes\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        \"output_cols\": [\"Data Type\", \"Keywords\", \"Best Chart Type\", \"Secondary Options\", \"Color Guidance\", \"Accessibility Notes\", \"Library Recommendation\", \"Interactive Level\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    \"landing\": {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        \"file\": \"landing.csv\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        \"search_cols\": [\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Conversion Optimization\", \"Section Order\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        \"output_cols\": [\"Pattern Name\", \"Keywords\", \"Section Order\", \"Primary CTA Placement\", \"Color Strategy\", \"Conversion Optimization\"]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    \"product\": {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        \"file\": \"products.csv\","
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 43
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\scripts\\core.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "| &#96;prompt&#96; | AI prompts, CSS keywords | (style name) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "### Available Stacks"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "| Stack | Focus |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "|-------|-------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "| &#96;html-tailwind&#96; | Tailwind utilities, responsive, a11y (DEFAULT) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "| &#96;react&#96; | State, hooks, performance, patterns |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "| &#96;nextjs&#96; | SSR, routing, images, API routes |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "| &#96;vue&#96; | Composition API, Pinia, Vue Router |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "| &#96;svelte&#96; | Runes, stores, SvelteKit |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "| &#96;swiftui&#96; | Views, State, Navigation, Animation |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "| &#96;react-native&#96; | Components, Navigation, Lists |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "| &#96;flutter&#96; | Widgets, State, Layout, Theming |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "## Example Workflow"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "**User request:** \"Làm landing page cho dịch vụ chăm sóc da chuyên nghiệp\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "**AI should:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "# 1. Search product type"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"beauty spa wellness service\" --domain product"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "# 2. Search style (based on industry: beauty, elegant)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"elegant minimal soft\" --domain style"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "# 3. Search typography"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"elegant luxury\" --domain typography"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "# 4. Search color palette"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"beauty spa wellness\" --domain color"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "# 5. Search landing page structure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"hero-centric social-proof\" --domain landing"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "# 6. Search UX guidelines"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"animation\" --domain ux"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"accessibility\" --domain ux"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "# 7. Search stack guidelines (default: html-tailwind)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"layout responsive\" --stack html-tailwind"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "**Then:** Synthesize all search results and implement the design."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "## Tips for Better Results"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "1. **Be specific with keywords** - \"healthcare SaaS dashboard\" \u003e \"app\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "2. **Search multiple times** - Different keywords reveal different insights"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "3. **Combine domains** - Style + Typography + Color = Complete design system"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "4. **Always check UX** - Search \"animation\", \"z-index\", \"accessibility\" for common issues"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 149
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 92
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\SKILL.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.27763840556144714
    },

            "text": "\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e"
          },

            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\u003chtml lang=\"en\"\u003e"
          },

            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\u003chead\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  \u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e"

            "text": "  \u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  \u003ctitle\u003eTemplate Gallery - Mark It Down\u003c/title\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "  \u003cmeta name=\"description\" content=\"37 Markdown templates for Mark It Down. AI, Productivity, Journaling, Dev, Content, and Thinking categories.\"\u003e"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "### Step 2: Search Relevant Domains"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "Use &#96;search.py&#96; multiple times to gather comprehensive information. Search until you have enough context."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"\u003ckeyword\u003e\" --domain \u003cdomain\u003e [-n \u003cmax_results\u003e]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "**Recommended search order:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "1. **Product** - Get style recommendations for product type"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "2. **Style** - Get detailed style guide (colors, effects, frameworks)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "3. **Typography** - Get font pairings with Google Fonts imports"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "4. **Color** - Get color palette (Primary, Secondary, CTA, Background, Text, Border)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "5. **Landing** - Get page structure (if landing page)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "6. **Chart** - Get chart recommendations (if dashboard/analytics)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "7. **UX** - Get best practices and anti-patterns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "8. **Stack** - Get stack-specific guidelines (default: html-tailwind)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "### Step 3: Stack Guidelines (Default: html-tailwind)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "If user doesn't specify a stack, **default to &#96;html-tailwind&#96;**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"\u003ckeyword\u003e\" --stack html-tailwind"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "Available stacks: &#96;html-tailwind&#96;, &#96;react&#96;, &#96;nextjs&#96;, &#96;vue&#96;, &#96;svelte&#96;, &#96;swiftui&#96;, &#96;react-native&#96;, &#96;flutter&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "## Search Reference"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "### Available Domains"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "| Domain | Use For | Example Keywords |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "|--------|---------|------------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "| &#96;product&#96; | Product type recommendations | SaaS, e-commerce, portfolio, healthcare, beauty, service |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "| &#96;style&#96; | UI styles, colors, effects | glassmorphism, minimalism, dark mode, brutalism |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "| &#96;typography&#96; | Font pairings, Google Fonts | elegant, playful, professional, modern |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "| &#96;color&#96; | Color palettes by product type | saas, ecommerce, healthcare, beauty, fintech, service |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "| &#96;landing&#96; | Page structure, CTA strategies | hero, hero-centric, testimonial, pricing, social-proof |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "| &#96;chart&#96; | Chart types, library recommendations | trend, comparison, timeline, funnel, pie |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "| &#96;ux&#96; | Best practices, anti-patterns | animation, accessibility, z-index, loading |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "| &#96;prompt&#96; | AI prompts, CSS keywords | (style name) |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "### Available Stacks"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 96
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 48
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\SKILL.md",
        "signatures": {}

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "name: ui-ux-pro-max"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "description: \"UI/UX design intelligence. 50 styles, 21 palettes, 50 font pairings, 20 charts, 8 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "# UI/UX Pro Max - Design Intelligence"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "Searchable database of UI styles, color palettes, font pairings, chart types, product recommendations, UX guidelines, and stack-specific best practices."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "## Prerequisites"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "Check if Python is installed:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "python3 --version || python --version"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "If Python is not installed, install it based on user's OS:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "**macOS:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "brew install python3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "**Ubuntu/Debian:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "sudo apt update \u0026\u0026 sudo apt install python3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "**Windows:**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;powershell"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "winget install Python.Python.3.12"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "## How to Use This Skill"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "When user requests UI/UX work (design, build, create, implement, review, fix, improve), follow this workflow:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "### Step 1: Analyze User Requirements"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "Extract key information from user request:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- **Product type**: SaaS, e-commerce, portfolio, dashboard, landing page, etc."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "- **Style keywords**: minimal, playful, professional, elegant, dark mode, etc."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "- **Industry**: healthcare, fintech, gaming, education, etc."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "- **Stack**: React, Vue, Next.js, or default to &#96;html-tailwind&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "### Step 2: Search Relevant Domains"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "Use &#96;search.py&#96; multiple times to gather comprehensive information. Search until you have enough context."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "python3 .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py \"\u003ckeyword\u003e\" --domain \u003cdomain\u003e [-n \u003cmax_results\u003e]"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 54
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\SKILL.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.2475171685218811
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 663,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 664
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 665,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 666
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 667,
            "text": "### Git通知抑制"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 668
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 669,
            "text": "&#96;.md&#96;拡張子の追加のみの変更（例: &#96;readme&#96; → &#96;readme.md&#96;）は実質的な変更なしとみなされ、通知に含まれません。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 670
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 671,
            "text": "**例**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 672
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 673,
            "text": "- &#96;README&#96; をタイトルから作成 → ローカル保存時にファイル名が自動的に &#96;README.md&#96; に変換"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 674,
            "text": "- この際の変更は「&#96;.md&#96;拡張子追加」として扱われ、次回Syncでは通知されない"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 675,
            "text": "- 実際のコンテンツ変更があった場合のみ変更通知を表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 676
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 677,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 678
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 679,
            "text": "### 6. Git Pullでの変更取得"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 680
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 681,
            "text": "**リモートから変更をプル**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 682
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 683,
            "text": "- **Pull** ボタンで最新の変更を取得"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 684
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 685,
            "text": "- 成功メッセージ: &#96;X件のファイルを同期しました（Y件作成、Z件の競合）&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 686
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 687,
            "text": "- 現在開いているノートが更新された場合、自動的にエディタに反映＋通知表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 688
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 689,
            "text": "**競合解決** (v1.15.0で大幅改善):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 690
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 691,
            "text": "- ローカルとリモートで同じノートが変更されている場合、競合モーダルが表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 692
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 693,
            "text": "- **精度向上**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 694,
            "text": "  - ホワイトスペースの差分（改行コード、空白）を自動正規化して誤検知を排除"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 695,
            "text": "  - ゼロ差分時は緑色のバナーでワンクリック自動解決"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 696,
            "text": "  - ファイル識別検証でリネーム後の誤比較を防止"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 697
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 698,
            "text": "- **UX改善**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 699,
            "text": "  - リスクレベルインジケーター（Low/Medium/High/Critical）で競合の深刻度を可視化"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 700,
            "text": "  - Myers差分アルゴリズムで正確な行単位比較・色分け表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 701,
            "text": "  - side-by-side比較、TOCナビゲーション、スクロール同期"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 702
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 703,
            "text": "- **安定性向上**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 704,
            "text": "  - 2秒デバウンスで連続同期の失敗を防止"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 705,
            "text": "  - 解決済み競合の5分間グレースピリオドで再出現を防止"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 706
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 707,
            "text": "- 複数の競合を一度に解決可能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 708
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 709,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 710
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 711,
            "text": "### 7. Discard Changes（変更の破棄）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 712
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 713,
            "text": "**ローカルの変更を破棄してリモートの状態に戻す**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 714
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 715,
            "text": "- ツールバーの **Git ▼** → **Git Settings** → **Danger Zone** から実行"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 716
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 717,
            "text": "- 変更があるノートでのみ「Discard Changes」ボタンが表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 718
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 719,
            "text": "- クリックすると確認ダイアログが表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 720
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 721,
            "text": "- 確認後、最後にPushした時点の内容に戻る"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 722
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 723,
            "text": "- ⚠️ この操作は元に戻せません"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 724
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 725,
            "text": "**使い方**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 726
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 727,
            "text": "- 「編集したけど、やっぱり前の状態に戻したい」場合に便利"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 728
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 729,
            "text": "- Pull前にローカルの変更を捨てたい場合にも使用可能"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 730
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 731,
            "text": "- **安全のため**: あえて操作しにくい場所に配置（誤クリック防止）→ Git ▼ → Git Settings → Danger Zone"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 732
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 733,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 734
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 735,
            "text": "### 8. Diff Modal（差分表示）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 736
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 737,
            "text": "**リモートとの差分を視覚的に比較**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 738
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 739,
            "text": "- Gitサイドバーで変更があるノートの「Diff」ボタンをクリック"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 740
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 741,
            "text": "- Side-by-sideでローカルとリモートの内容を比較"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 742
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 743,
            "text": "- 変更箇所がハイライト表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 744
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 745,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 746
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 747,
            "text": "### 9. Commit History（コミット履歴）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 748
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 749,
            "text": "**過去のコミット履歴を閲覧**:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 750
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 751,
            "text": "- Gitドロップダウンまたはサイドバーの「History」ボタンをクリック"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 752
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 753,
            "text": "- 最新20件のコミット履歴を表示"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 754
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 755,
            "text": "- コミットメッセージ、日時、変更ファイル数を確認"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 756
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 757,
            "text": "---"
          }
        ],

**ある。** ただし「framework/template 一覧」という名前の単一ファイルはなく、複数箇所に分散しています。

## リストの所在

| 場所 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| [`docs/templates.html`](docs/templates.html) / [`docs/templates-ja.html`](docs/templates-ja.html) | ギャラリー UI（カード一覧） |
| [`docs/templates/view.html`](docs/templates/view.html) / [`view-ja.html`](docs/templates/view-ja.html) | `ALL_TEMPLATES` 配列（ナビゲーション用の正本に近い） |
| [`docs/templates/`](docs/templates/) | 実体の Markdown ファイル（`category/slug.md`） |

**注意:** EN と JA で件数がずれています。JA 版だけ `productivity/ywt-retrospective`（YWT振り返り）がギャラリー・`ALL_TEMPLATES` に含まれ、EN 版には未掲載です。

**Framework 相当**（既存フレームワークを Markdown 化したもの）としては、Productivity の振り返り系（KPT, YWT, 4Ls, Starfish, Start-Stop-Continue）、OKR、RACI、Thinking カテゴリ全体が該当します。ただしリポジトリ内では「framework」と「template」の区別はなく、すべて `docs/templates/` 配下のテンプレートとして扱われています。

使用エージェント: なし（直接検索のみ）
